obligations.area: successor-verification objective map and no-proxy guard
obligations.required_evidence: machine-readable W041 obligation map, promotion-target gate map, and no-proxy guard before later evidence beads start
obligations.promotion_consequence: release-grade, C5, pack-grade, Stage 2, service, diversity, OxFml breadth, callable metadata, callable carrier, and full-formalization claims remain blocked unless later W041 evidence satisfies their target guards

obligations.required_evidence: automatic optimized/core differential evidence for dynamic dependency additions, removals, reclassification, release, and soft-reference transition detection, or exact residual blocker
obligations.promotion_consequence: full optimized/core verification remains blocked

obligations.required_evidence: coordinator and optimized/core evidence for stale-candidate snapshot rejection and no-publication behavior under promoted profiles
obligations.promotion_consequence: snapshot-fence conformance and Stage 2 readiness remain blocked

obligations.required_evidence: coordinator and optimized/core evidence for capability-view mismatch rejection and no-publication behavior under promoted profiles
obligations.promotion_consequence: capability-fence conformance and Stage 2 readiness remain blocked

obligations.required_evidence: callable metadata projection fixture or implementation evidence, or exact blocker with consumed OxFml callable rows classified

obligations.required_evidence: zero declared-gap, file-backed-only, bounded-only, or watch-only promotion for optimized/core, replay, pack, service, diversity, and OxFml seam rows
obligations.promotion_consequence: pack/C5 and release-grade decisions remain no-promotion if any target depends on proxy evidence counted as a match

obligations.required_evidence: panic-free evidence for promoted Rust paths, or exact panic-surface blockers with uncovered paths named

obligations.required_evidence: refinement relation from TraceCalc-covered reference behavior to optimized/core behavior, with totality boundaries named for non-covered Rust paths

obligations.required_evidence: checked Lean rows that separate discharged proof, explicit assumption, external seam, and unproved totality boundary, with axiom/sorry/admit audit

obligations.promotion_consequence: full TLA verification and Stage 2 policy remain blocked

obligations.required_evidence: production-relevant partition analyzer soundness statement or proof for promoted profiles, including dynamic references, soft dependencies, publication fences, capability fences, and callable metadata
